title: RessourcefulBeesLike
description: ResourcefulBeesLike adding customizable bees for resource gathering, breeding hybrids, and upgradable hives.
body:
# ResourcefulBeesLike

Welcome to the official repository for the **ResourcefulBeesLike** plugin, a Spigot plugin inspired by the popular Minecraft mod "Resourceful Bees". This plugin introduces a unique beekeeping system where bees can gather resources, mutate, and be bred to create powerful hybrids.

## Features

- **Material-Based Bee Species**: A variety of bee species linked to different in-game materials such as metals, gems, and more.

![Material Bee Spawning](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZmV0Ymh5enZiNW5lMnRmZnN5d3F2ZzE4M3Vja2V2MG1weDM0eWp5NyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/WysjzM2enp67hbC0Vw/giphy.gif)
![Production from honeycomb](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbjJhdDNkM3VzOHoxa3YxdDBrZzh3MTNkeDkyZGxzd2o4cm8ybzBxZSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Vf2f1t8wBOIussVIEE/giphy.gif)

- **Upgradable Beehives**: Construct and upgrade beehives with custom crafting recipes for improved resource efficiency.

![Beehives](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZnN3bnAwN2E4a25hcnNhZWw3N2t0emFreGY5NmZwZXZqcHZydW9wMyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/pl3OpLIWlUTWLfJtbM/giphy.gif)

- **Mutation Mechanics**: Bees can mutate when passing over specific blocks, which are configurable, adding a dynamic element to beekeeping.

![mutations](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZGxnbjg0amJkaTdzbDBsY2lseXY0Y3R3dThkbjVoczgwcTZid3l0aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/zRzPitNaQTcJMiJ5rB/giphy.gif)

- **Breeding and Hybrids**: Breed bees to create hybrid species with unique traits and enhanced abilities.

![breed](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExY3dscTdsZ2I2N2RtejVmOWN6NmYxaXUzZG91dWZ6dm9nYm51cGZzayZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Nl0Bmm6CQ6R92idwq4/giphy.gif)

- **New Items Tools**: Bee box and Bee jar to store one or multiple bees.

![beebox](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbGVndXRweXF0NTE0MnA4ZG80Mmc1YmV1Z3dpaW03bGE0cXM1MDN0cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/gbZid02CPFXJ63K84J/giphy.gif)
![beejar](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExd3JkZWsxaGtjOHJneHA5amp1bXU3NXNvNTJkMHE1bWR3ZW1iajJ0ciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/YD7w0bP96z3nvZozhd/giphy.gif)

- **Customization and Configuration**: Extensive configuration options to tailor bee behaviors, mutations, and breeding mechanics to your server's needs.
- **API for Addon Development**: Robust API to create addons and extend the plugin’s functionality.

## Installation

1. **Download the Plugin**: Get the latest version of the plugin.
2. **Place in Plugins Folder**: Drop the downloaded `.jar` file into your server's `plugins` folder.
3. **Restart Server**: Restart your server to load the plugin.

## Configuration

The plugin comes with a comprehensive configuration file that allows you to customize bee behaviors, hive upgrades, mutation blocks, and more. After the first run, you'll find the configuration files in the `plugins/ResourcefulBeesLikePlugin` directory.

Documentation soon...
## Issues

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for new features, please report them on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Traqueur-dev/ResourcefulBeesLike/issues).
